sides (integer): A list of integers representing the number of sides for each die.
count (integer): A list of integers representing the number of times to roll each die. Default

tools.name: upcoming_matches_api_for_fantasy_cricket

tools.description: A list of currently running  and upcoming cricket series from around the world. Any issues, queries, api integration, custom plan or to **Create your own Fantasy Sports Application**  contact us at support@techflinch.com

tools.name: matchlist_by_seriesid_for_fantasy_cricket
tools.description: Using Series ID get the name, participating teams, start date, end date and match keys for the matches of a specified Series. Any issues, queries, api integration, custom plan or to **Create your own Fantasy Sports Application**  contact us at support@tech

tools.name: live_fantasy_score_for_fantasy_cricket
tools.description:
Real-time and Low-Latency Match Live Score API. Get the match score, Batting, bowling and fielding information for a specified match in real time
Any issues, queries, api integration, custom plan or to **Create your own Fantasy Sports Application**  contac

tools.description: Using match ID get the list of players in the squad for the match as announced by the teams. Any issues, queries, api integration, custom plan or to **Create your own Fantasy Sports Application**  contact us at support@techflinch.com

tools.name: playing_eleven_api_for_fantasy_cricket
tools.description: Get Playing Eleven by matchid when it's announced by the teams. Any issues, queries, api integration, custom plan or to **Create your own Fantasy Sports Application**  contact us at support@techflinch.com

tools.name: live_matches_api_for_fantasy_cricket
tools.description: A list of cricket matches from around the world that are currently Live. Any issues, queries, api integration, custom plan or to **Create your own Fantasy Sports Application**  contact us at support@techflinch.com
